(noscript) -->\n\n\n\u003cscript>\n;(() => {\n  // ========= CONFIG =========\n  const PAGE_BTN_ID   = 'rmPrintPageBtn';\n  const CAT_BTN_ID    = 'rmPrintSectionBtn';\n  const UI_STYLE_ID   = 'rmPrintUIStyles';\n  const CONTAINER_SEL = '.rm-Guides, .rm-Changelog';\n  const GAP_ABOVE_PAGE= 10;\n  const HARD_LIMIT    = 999;\n  const CONFIRM_LIMIT = 100;\n  const BTN_Z         = 10000;\n  const SHOW_HEADER_BAR = true;\n\n  // Performance knobs\n  const CONCURRENCY   = 3;\n  const IFRAME_W      = 1200;\n  const IFRAME_H      = 2400;\n  const RENDER_TIMEOUT_MS = 20000;\n  const STABILIZE_IDLE_MS = 400;\n  const SCROLL_STEP_PX   = 900;\n  const SCROLL_INTERVAL  = 140;\n\n  // ========= (no visible debugger) =========\n  let DEBUG = false;\n  const NS = '[Print]';\n  const t = () => new Date().toISOString().split('T')[1].replace('Z','');\n  const clog = (...a) => DEBUG && console.log(`${NS} ${t()}`, ...a);\n  const cwarn = (...a) => console.warn(`${NS} ${t()}`, ...a);\n\n  // ========= BASE CSS =========\n  const ensureStyles = () => {\n    if (document.getElementById(UI_STYLE_ID)) return;\n    const css = `\n      #${PAGE_BTN_ID}, #${CAT_BTN_ID}{\n        position:fixed; right:18px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:14px;\n        font-weight:600; color:#fff; border:0; border-radius:6px; cursor:pointer;\n        box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.15); display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;\n        z-index:${BTN_Z};\n      }\n      #${PAGE_BTN_ID}{ bottom:12px; background:#ff5500; }\n      #${PAGE_BTN_ID}:hover{ background:#ff6b21; }\n      #${CAT_BTN_ID}{ background:#27364a; bottom:52px; }\n      #${CAT_BTN_ID}:hover{ background:#364a62; }\n\n      .rmPrintOverlay{ position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(0,0,0,.4); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; z-index:${BTN_Z+50}; }\n      .rmPrintModal{ width:560px; max-width:92vw; background:#fff; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.25); padding:16px; font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif; }\n      .rmPrintModal h3{ margin:0 0 10px; font-size:15px; line-height:1.3; }\n      .rmPrintProgress{ height:8px; background:#e5e7eb; border-radius:999px; overflow:hidden; margin-top:8px; }\n      .rmPrintBar{ height:100%; width:0%; background:#253746; transition:width .2s ease; }\n      .rmPrintRow{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; margin-top:8px; }\n      .rmPrintSpin{ width:16px; height:16px; border:2px solid #e5e7eb; border-top-color:#253746; border-radius:50%; animation:rmSpin .8s linear infinite; }\n      .rmPrintText{ font-size:12.5px; color:#111827; font-weight:600; }\n      .rmPrintSub{ font-size:12px; color:#6b7280; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap; max-width:100%; }\n      .rmPrintActions{ display:flex; justify-content:flex-end; gap:8px; margin-top:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; }\n      .rmBtn{ border-radius:6px; font-size:12.5px; padding:6px 10px; cursor:pointer; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; background:#f3f4f6; }\n      .rmBtn:hover{ background:#e5e7eb; }\n      .rmBtnPrimary{ background:#27364a; color:#fff; border-color:#27364a; }\n      .rmBtnPrimary:hover{ background:#364a62; }\n      @keyframes rmSpin{from{transform:rotate(0)}to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}\n      @media print{ #${PAGE_BTN_ID},#${CAT_BTN_ID} { display:none !important; } }\n\n      .rmPickerWrap{ max-height:54vh; overflow:auto; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:8px; padding:8px; }\n      .rmPickerRow{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; padding:8px 6px; border-radius:6px; }\n      .rmPickerRow:hover{ background:#f7f8fa69; }\n      .rmPickerTitle{ flex:1; font-size:13px; }\n      .rmPickerCount{ font-size:12px; opacity:.7; }\n      .rmPickerTop{ display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:8px; gap:8px; }\n      .rmPickerTop .rmHint{ font-size:12px; opacity:.75; }\n      .rmPickerTop .rmBulk{ display:flex; gap:8px; }\n      .rmPickerEmpty{ padding:8px; font-size:13px; opacity:.75; }\n\n      [data-color-mode=\"dark\"] .rmPrintModal { background:#0b1220; color:#e2e8f0; }\n      @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {\n        [data-color-mode=\"system\"] .rmPrintModal { background:#0b1220; color:#e2e8f0; }\n      }\n    `;\n    const s = document.createElement('style');\n    s.id = UI_STYLE_ID;\n    s.textContent = css;\n    (document.head || document.documentElement).appendChild(s);\n  };\n\n  // ========= UTILS =========\n  const text = (el) => (el ? (el.textContent || '').replace(/\\s+/g,' ').trim() : '');\n  const escapeHtml = (s) => String(s)\n    .replaceAll('&','&amp;').replaceAll('\u003c','&lt;').replaceAll('>','&gt;')\n    .replaceAll('\"','&quot;').replaceAll(\"'\",\"&#39;\");\n  const sleep = (ms) => new Promise(res => setTimeout(res, ms));\n\n  const normalizeDocUrl = (href) => {\n    const u = new URL(href, location.href);\n    // FORCE page-only preview to bypass app shell / login UI\n    u.searchParams.set('isFramePreview', 'true');\n    return u.href;\n  };\n\n  const getProjectName = () =>\n    document.querySelector('meta[property=\"og:site_name\"]')?.content?.trim() || '';\n\n  const getContainer = () => document.querySelector(CONTAINER_SEL);\n\n  const getContentAndTitle = () => {\n    const container = getContainer();\n    if (!container) return { el: null, title: '' };\n    const el =\n      container.querySelector('#content') ||\n      container.querySelector('article.rm-Changelog-post') ||\n      container.querySelector('article.rm-Article') ||\n      container.querySelector('.rm-Markdown[data-testid=\"RDMD\"]') ||\n      container.querySelector('main') ||\n      container;\n    const h1 =\n      container.querySelector('#content-head h1') ||\n      el?.querySelector?.('h1') ||\n      container.querySelector('h1');\n    return { el, title: text(h1) || document.title || 'Untitled' };\n  };\n\n  // ========= Sidebar/category helpers =========\n  const getDocsDocument = () => {\n    const sb = getSidebarFrom(document);\n    if (sb) return document;\n    const iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"/docs/\"]');\n    try { if (iframe && iframe.contentDocument) return iframe.contentDocument; } catch {}\n    return document;\n  };\n  const getSidebarFrom = (docCtx) =>\n    docCtx.getElementById('hub-sidebar') || docCtx.querySelector('.rm-Sidebar.hub-sidebar');\n\n  const getSectionTitle = (section) => {\n    const h = section.querySelector('.rm-Sidebar-heading, h2');\n    const t = h?.querySelector?.('.category-toggle');\n    return text(t || h);\n  };\n\n  const collectDocUrlsFromSection = (section) => {\n    const anchors = Array.from(section.querySelectorAll('a.rm-Sidebar-link[href]'));\n    const seen = new Set();\n    const urls = [];\n    for (const a of anchors) {\n      const href = a.getAttribute('href');\n      try {\n        const u = new URL(href, location.href);\n        if (u.origin !== location.origin) continue;\n        if (!/\\/docs\\//.test(u.pathname)) continue;\n        // ALWAYS add isFramePreview for capture\n        const finalHref = normalizeDocUrl(u.href);\n        // de-dupe by pathname (ignore query)\n        if (!seen.has(u.pathname)) { seen.add(u.pathname); urls.push(finalHref); }\n      } catch {}\n    }\n    // current page first\n    urls.sort((A,B) => (new URL(A).pathname === location.pathname ? -1 : new URL(B).pathname === location.pathname ? 1 : 0));\n    return urls;\n  };\n\n  const getCategories = () => {\n    const sideDoc = getDocsDocument();\n    const sb = getSidebarFrom(sideDoc);\n    const sections = sb ? Array.from(sb.querySelectorAll('.rm-Sidebar-section')) : [];\n    return sections.map(sec => ({ section: sec, title: getSectionTitle(sec), urls: collectDocUrlsFromSection(sec) }))\n                   .filter(r => r.urls.length);\n  };\n\n  // ========= Overlay (no debug UI) =========\n  const openOverlay = (total, label) => {\n    const overlay = document.createElement('div');\n    overlay.className = 'rmPrintOverlay';\n    overlay.innerHTML = `\n      \u003cdiv class=\"rmPrintModal\">\n        \u003ch3>Preparing print view\u003c/h3>\n        \u003cdiv class=\"rmPrintProgress\">\u003cdiv class=\"rmPrintBar\" id=\"rmPrintBar\">\u003c/div>\u003c/div>\n        \u003cdiv class=\"rmPrintRow\">\n          \u003cdiv class=\"rmPrintSpin\">\u003c/div>\n          \u003cdiv>\n            \u003cdiv class=\"rmPrintText\" id=\"rmPrintText\">0 / ${total} pages\u003c/div>\n            \u003cdiv class=\"rmPrintSub\" id=\"rmPrintSub\">${label || ''}\u003c/div>\n          \u003c/div>\n        \u003c/div>\n        \u003cdiv class=\"rmPrintActions\">\n          \u003cbutton type=\"button\" class=\"rmBtn\" id=\"rmPrintCancel\">Cancel\u003c/button>\n        \u003c/div>\n      \u003c/div>`;\n    document.body.appendChild(overlay);\n    let canceled = false;\n    const $ = (sel) => overlay.querySelector(sel);\n    $('#rmPrintCancel').onclick = () => { canceled = true; };\n    return {\n      isCanceled: () => canceled,\n      update: (loaded, sub) => {\n        const pct = total > 0 ? Math.min(100, Math.round((loaded / total) * 100)) : 0;\n        $('#rmPrintBar').style.width = pct + '%';\n        $('#rmPrintText').textContent = `${loaded} / ${total} pages`;\n        if (sub) $('#rmPrintSub').textContent = sub;\n      },\n      set: (sub) => { $('#rmPrintSub').textContent = sub; },\n      log: () => {}, // no-op\n      close: () => overlay.remove()\n    };\n  };\n\n  // ========= Helpers =========\n  function absolutizeUrls(node, base) {\n    const toAbs = (url) => { try { return new URL(url, base).href; } catch { return url; } };\n\n    // Ensure images render (promote lazy-src, no-referrer, no lazy)\n    node.querySelectorAll('img').forEach(img => {\n      const lazy = img.getAttribute('data-src') || img.getAttribute('data-lazy-src');\n      if (!img.getAttribute('src') && lazy) img.setAttribute('src', lazy);\n      const src = img.getAttribute('src');\n      if (src && !/^data:|^blob:|^https?:\\/\\//i.test(src)) img.setAttribute('src', toAbs(src));\n      img.setAttribute('referrerpolicy', 'no-referrer');\n      img.removeAttribute('loading');\n    });\n\n    node.querySelectorAll('[src]').forEach(el => {\n      const s = el.getAttribute('src');\n      if (s && !/^data:|^blob:|^https?:\\/\\//i.test(s)) el.setAttribute('src', toAbs(s));\n    });\n    node.querySelectorAll('[href]').forEach(el => {\n      const h = el.getAttribute('href');\n      if (h && !/^#|^mailto:|^tel:|^data:|^blob:|^https?:\\/\\//i.test(h)) el.setAttribute('href', toAbs(h));\n    });\n  }\n\n  function sanitizeNodeToHTML(node, baseUrl) {\n    const clone = node.cloneNode(true);\n\n    // --- NEW: expand accordions and tabs for print ---\n    // 1) Open all accordions so \u003cdetails> content is included\n    clone.querySelectorAll('details.Accordion').forEach(details => {\n      details.setAttribute('open', '');\n    });\n\n    // 2) Make sure all tab panels are \"visible\" in markup\n    clone.querySelectorAll('.TabContent').forEach(panel => {\n      panel.removeAttribute('hidden');\n      panel.removeAttribute('aria-hidden');\n      if (panel.style) {\n        panel.style.removeProperty('display');\n        panel.style.removeProperty('visibility');\n      }\n    });\n    // --- END NEW ---\n\n    clone.querySelectorAll('script, noscript, iframe').forEach(el => el.remove());\n    const walker = document.createTreeWalker(clone, NodeFilter.SHOW_ELEMENT, null, false);\n    while (walker.nextNode()) {\n      const el = walker.currentNode;\n      for (const attr of Array.from(el.attributes)) {\n        if (/^on/i.test(attr.name)) el.removeAttribute(attr.name);\n      }\n      if (el.style && (el.style.display === 'none' || el.style.visibility === 'hidden')) {\n        el.style.removeProperty('display');\n        el.style.removeProperty('visibility');\n      }\n    }\n    try { absolutizeUrls(clone, baseUrl); } catch {}\n    return clone.innerHTML;\n  }\n\n  // ========= NEW: flatten TabGroups into static print blocks (in-place) =========\n  async function expandTabGroupsForPrint(root) {\n    if (!root) return () => {};\n    const groups = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('.TabGroup'));\n    if (!groups.length) return () => {};\n\n    const cleanupFns = [];\n\n    for (const group of groups) {\n      const nav = group.querySelector('.TabGroup-nav');\n      if (!nav) continue;\n\n      const buttons = Array.from(\n        nav.querySelectorAll('.TabGroup-tab, .TabGroup-tab_active')\n      );\n      if (buttons.length \u003c= 1) continue;\n\n      const originallyActive = buttons.find(btn =>\n        btn.classList.contains('TabGroup-tab_active')\n      ) || null;\n\n      // This will replace the TabGroup in-place while we clone for print\n      const printWrapper = document.createElement('div');\n      printWrapper.className = 'TabGroup-print';\n\n      for (const btn of buttons) {\n        const label = (btn.textContent || '').trim();\n        if (!label) continue;\n\n        // Switch to this tab in the live DOM\n        btn.click();\n        await sleep(60);\n\n        const panel = group.querySelector('.TabContent');\n        if (!panel) continue;\n\n        const section = document.createElement('section');\n        section.className = 'TabGroup-print-section';\n\n        const h = document.createElement('h4');\n        h.textContent = label;\n        section.appendChild(h);\n\n        section.appendChild(panel.cloneNode(true));\n        printWrapper.appendChild(section);\n      }\n\n      // Restore original active tab\n      if (originallyActive) {\n        originallyActive.click();\n      }\n\n      const parent = group.parentNode;\n      if (!parent) continue;\n\n      // IMPORTANT: replace the TabGroup in-place\n      parent.replaceChild(printWrapper, group);\n\n      // Cleanup to put the original TabGroup back after we’ve cloned the DOM\n      cleanupFns.push(() => {\n        if (printWrapper.parentNode === parent) {\n          parent.replaceChild(group, printWrapper);\n          if (originallyActive) originallyActive.click();\n        }\n      });\n    }\n\n    return () => { cleanupFns.forEach(fn => fn()); };\n  }\n\n  function findContentRoot(doc) {\n    const candidates = [\n      'article.rm-Article .rm-Markdown[data-testid=\"RDMD\"]',\n      'article.rm-Article .rm-Markdown',\n      'article.rm-Article',\n      '#content .rm-Markdown[data-testid=\"RDMD\"]',\n      '#content .rm-Markdown',\n      '#content article',\n      '#content',\n      '.rm-Markdown[data-testid=\"RDMD\"]',\n      '.rm-Markdown',\n      'main .rm-Markdown',\n      'main article',\n      'main'\n    ];\n    for (const sel of candidates) {\n      const el = doc.querySelector(sel);\n      if (!el) continue;\n      if (el.closest('.Admin, .admin, .hub-Admin, [data-admin]')) continue;\n      if (el.children && el.children.length) return el;\n      if (el.textContent && el.textContent.trim().length > 40) return el;\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  async function waitForRenderWithAutoScroll(doc, deadlineMs, log) {\n    const start = Date.now();\n    let lastLen = 0;\n    let lastChange = Date.now();\n    const rootOrNull = () => findContentRoot(doc);\n    let root = rootOrNull();\n\n    async function loop() {\n      const now = Date.now();\n      if (now - start > deadlineMs) return rootOrNull();\n\n      root = rootOrNull() || doc.body;\n\n      try {\n        const win = doc.defaultView || doc.parentWindow;\n        const maxY = Math.max(doc.body?.scrollHeight || 0, doc.documentElement?.scrollHeight || 0);\n        const curY = (win && win.scrollY) || 0;\n        if (win) win.scrollTo(0, Math.min(curY + SCROLL_STEP_PX, maxY));\n      } catch {}\n\n      const len = (root?.textContent || '').replace(/\\s+/g,' ').trim().length;\n      if (len !== lastLen) { lastLen = len; lastChange = now; }\n\n      if (now - lastChange >= STABILIZE_IDLE_MS && len > 40) return root;\n      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, SCROLL_INTERVAL));\n      return loop();\n    }\n    return loop();\n  }\n\n  // ========= PUBLIC FETCH FIRST (NO COOKIES) with isFramePreview =========\n  async function fetchPublicHTML(url, overlayLog) {\n    const finalUrl = normalizeDocUrl(url);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(finalUrl, {\n        credentials: 'omit',\n        cache: 'no-store',\n        redirect: 'follow'\n      });\n      if (!res.ok) return null;\n      const html = await res.text();\n      const parser = new DOMParser();\n      const doc = parser.parseFromString(html, 'text/html');\n      const root = findContentRoot(doc);\n      const len = (root?.textContent || '').replace(/\\s+/g,' ').trim().length;\n      if (!root || len \u003c 40) return null;\n\n      const h1 = doc.querySelector('#content-head h1') || root.querySelector('h1') || doc.querySelector('h1');\n      const titleText = h1?.textContent?.trim() || doc.title || '(Untitled)';\n      const body = sanitizeNodeToHTML(root, finalUrl);\n      const cssHrefs = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('link[rel=\"stylesheet\"]')).map(l => l.href).filter(Boolean);\n      return { url: finalUrl, title: titleText, html: body, cssHrefs };\n    } catch {\n      return null;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // ========= RENDER IFRAME (fallback) with isFramePreview =========\n  function loadPageRendered(url) {\n    return new Promise((resolve) => {\n      const finalUrl = normalizeDocUrl(url);\n\n      const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');\n      Object.assign(iframe.style, {\n        position:'fixed', width: IFRAME_W + 'px', height: IFRAME_H + 'px',\n        top: '-10000px', left: '0', border: '0', opacity: '0'\n      });\n      iframe.src = finalUrl;\n      document.body.appendChild(iframe);\n\n      let done = false;\n      const cleanup = () => { if (!done) { done = true; setTimeout(() => iframe.remove(), 0); } };\n      const timeout = setTimeout(() => { resolve({ url: finalUrl, title: '(timeout)', html: '', cssHrefs: [] }); cleanup(); }, RENDER_TIMEOUT_MS);\n\n      iframe.onload = async () => {\n        try {\n          const doc = iframe.contentDocument || iframe.contentWindow?.document;\n          if (!doc) { resolve({ url: finalUrl, title: '(no doc)', html: '', cssHrefs: [] }); return cleanup(); }\n          const root = await waitForRenderWithAutoScroll(doc, RENDER_TIMEOUT_MS - 500);\n          const len = (root?.textContent || '').replace(/\\s+/g,' ').trim().length;\n\n          if (!root || len \u003c 40) {\n            resolve({ url: finalUrl, title: doc.title || '(Untitled)', html: '', cssHrefs: [] });\n            return cleanup();\n          }\n\n          const h1 = doc.querySelector('#content-head h1') || root.querySelector('h1') || doc.querySelector('h1');\n          const titleText = h1?.textContent?.trim() || doc.title || '(Untitled)';\n          const html = sanitizeNodeToHTML(root, finalUrl);\n          const cssHrefs = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('link[rel=\"stylesheet\"]')).map(l => l.href).filter(Boolean);\n          resolve({ url: finalUrl, title: titleText, html, cssHrefs });\n        } catch {\n          resolve({ url: finalUrl, title: '(error)', html: '', cssHrefs: [] });\n        } finally {\n          clearTimeout(timeout);\n          cleanup();\n        }\n      };\n\n      iframe.onerror = () => {\n        clearTimeout(timeout);\n        cleanup();\n        resolve({ url: finalUrl, title: '(error)', html: '', cssHrefs: [] });\n      };\n    });\n  }\n\n  // ========= Build print doc =========\n  const buildPrintDoc = ({ title, bodyHTML, pageCssHrefs = [], headerTitle, headerSubtitle }) => {\n    const headerBar = SHOW_HEADER_BAR ? `\n      \u003cdiv id=\"print-header\" style=\"position:sticky;top:0;z-index:1;background:#fff;border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb;padding:12px 20px;\">\n        \u003cdiv style=\"font:bold 14px/1.2 system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif\">${escapeHtml(headerTitle || '')}\u003c/div>\n        ${headerSubtitle ? `\u003cdiv style=\"font:500 12px/1.2 system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;opacity:.7\">${escapeHtml(headerSubtitle)}\u003c/div>` : ``}\n      \u003c/div>` : '';\n\n    const printCSS = `\n      @media print { html, body { background:#fff; } }\n      html, body { margin:0; color:#333; font-family:Arial,system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,sans-serif; line-height:1.55; }\n      #print-wrap{ padding: 18px 24px; }\n      #print-wrap .rm-Markdown, #print-wrap .rm-Article, #print-wrap #content, #print-wrap main { display:block !important; visibility:visible !important; }\n      #print-wrap [data-hidden], #print-wrap .is-hidden { display:block !important; visibility:visible !important; }\n      #print-wrap header, #print-wrap nav, #print-wrap .rm-Sidebar, #print-wrap footer,\n      #print-wrap .hub-sidebar, #print-wrap .rm-Header, #print-wrap .rm-Footer { display:none !important; }\n      h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6{ page-break-after:avoid; page-break-inside:avoid; margin:0 0 .6em; }\n      p, ul, ol, table{ page-break-inside:avoid; }\n      img{ max-width:100% !important; height:auto; page-break-inside:avoid; display:block; margin:12px 0; }\n      table{ width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; }\n      th,td{ border:1px solid #e5e7eb; padding:8px; vertical-align:top; }\n      th{ background:#f6f8fa; text-align:left; }\n      .content-toc, .PaginationControls, .rm-Pagination, .PageThumbs, .suggestEdits, .UpdatedAt { display:none !important; }\n      .callout, .Accordion, .CardsGrid, .TabGroup-nav { page-break-inside:avoid !important; }\n      .page-break{ page-break-before:always !important; }\n\n      /* NEW: better printed accordions + tabs */\n      #print-wrap details.Accordion > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display:none; }\n      #print-wrap .Accordion-toggleIcon { display:none !important; }\n      #print-wrap .TabGroup-nav { display:none !important; }\n      #print-wrap .TabContent { display:block !important; visibility:visible !important; }\n      #print-wrap .TabGroup-print-section h4 { margin:1.2em 0 .4em; font-size:1.05em; }\n    `;\n\n    return `\n      \u003c!doctype html>\u003chtml>\u003chead>\u003cmeta charset=\"utf-8\">\n      \u003ctitle>${escapeHtml(title || 'Print')}\u003c/title>\n      ${pageCssHrefs.map(h => `\u003clink rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"${h}\" media=\"all\">`).join('\\n')}\n      \u003cbase href=\"${location.origin}/\">\n      \u003cstyle>${printCSS}\u003c/style>\n      \u003c/head>\u003cbody>\n        ${headerBar}\n        \u003cdiv id=\"print-wrap\">${bodyHTML}\u003c/div>\n      \u003c/body>\u003c/html>`;\n  };\n\n  const printHtmlInIframe = (html) => {\n    const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');\n    Object.assign(iframe.style, { position:'fixed', width:'0', height:'0', border:'0', right:'0', bottom:'0' });\n    document.body.appendChild(iframe);\n    const doc = iframe.contentWindow.document;\n    doc.open(); doc.write(html); doc.close();\n    setTimeout(() => {\n      iframe.contentWindow.focus();\n      iframe.contentWindow.print();\n      setTimeout(() => iframe.remove(), 700);\n    }, 80);\n  };\n\n  // ========= Category Picker =========\n  async function openCategoryPicker(cats) {\n    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n      const overlay = document.createElement('div');\n      overlay.className = 'rmPrintOverlay';\n      overlay.setAttribute('role', 'dialog');\n      overlay.setAttribute('aria-modal', 'true');\n\n      const rowsHtml = cats.map((c, idx) => `\n        \u003clabel class=\"rmPickerRow\" for=\"rmPick_${idx}\">\n          \u003cinput id=\"rmPick_${idx}\" type=\"checkbox\" class=\"rmPickCb\" data-idx=\"${idx}\" />\n          \u003cdiv class=\"rmPickerTitle\">${c.title ? c.title.replace(/\\s+/g,' ').trim() : 'Untitled section'}\u003c/div>\n          \u003cdiv class=\"rmPickerCount\">${c.urls.length}\u003c/div>\n        \u003c/label>\n      `).join('');\n\n      overlay.innerHTML = `\n        \u003cdiv class=\"rmPrintModal\" style=\"max-width:680px\">\n          \u003ch3>Select section(s) to print\u003c/h3>\n          \u003cdiv class=\"rmPickerTop\">\n            \u003cdiv class=\"rmHint\">Choose one or more categories. Current page is included if present.\u003c/div>\n            \u003cdiv class=\"rmBulk\">\n              \u003cbutton type=\"button\" class=\"rmBtn\" id=\"rmPickAll\">Select all\u003c/button>\n              \u003cbutton type=\"button\" class=\"rmBtn\" id=\"rmPickNone\">Clear\u003c/button>\n            \u003c/div>\n          \u003c/div>\n          \u003cdiv class=\"rmPickerWrap\" tabindex=\"0\">\n            ${rowsHtml || `\u003cdiv class=\"rmPickerEmpty\">No sections found.\u003c/div>`}\n          \u003c/div>\n          \u003cdiv class=\"rmPrintActions\">\n            \u003cbutton type=\"button\" class=\"rmBtn\" id=\"rmPickCancel\">Cancel\u003c/button>\n            \u003cbutton type=\"button\" class=\"rmBtn rmBtnPrimary\" id=\"rmPickContinue\" disabled>Continue\u003c/button>\n          \u003c/div>\n        \u003c/div>\n      `;\n\n      document.body.appendChild(overlay);\n      const $ = (sel) => overlay.querySelector(sel);\n      const $$ = (sel) => Array.from(overlay.querySelectorAll(sel));\n      const btnAll = $('#rmPickAll');\n      const btnNone = $('#rmPickNone');\n      const btnCancel = $('#rmPickCancel');\n      const btnGo = $('#rmPickContinue');\n      const checkboxes = $$('.rmPickCb');\n\n      const updateButtonState = () => {\n        const any = checkboxes.some(cb => cb.checked);\n        btnGo.disabled = !any;\n      };\n      const close = () => { overlay.remove(); };\n\n      btnAll.onclick = () => { checkboxes.forEach(cb => cb.checked = true); updateButtonState(); };\n      btnNone.onclick = () => { checkboxes.forEach(cb => cb.checked = false); updateButtonState(); };\n      btnCancel.onclick = () => { close(); reject(new Error('canceled')); };\n      btnGo.onclick = () => {\n        const pickedIdx = checkboxes.filter(cb => cb.checked).map(cb => Number(cb.getAttribute('data-idx'))).filter(i => !Number.isNaN(i));\n        const chosen = pickedIdx.map(i => cats[i]);\n        close(); resolve(chosen);\n      };\n\n      checkboxes.forEach(cb => cb.addEventListener('change', updateButtonState, { passive:true }));\n      updateButtonState();\n      overlay.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\n        if (e.key === 'Escape') { e.preventDefault(); btnCancel.click(); }\n        if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key.toLowerCase() === 'a') { e.preventDefault(); btnAll.click(); }\n        if (e.key === 'Enter' && !btnGo.disabled) { e.preventDefault(); btnGo.click(); }\n      });\n      setTimeout(() => overlay.querySelector('.rmPickerWrap')?.focus(), 0);\n    });\n  }\n\n  // ========= Actions =========\n  const collectCssLinks = (doc) =>\n    Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('link[rel=\"stylesheet\"]')).map(l => l.href).filter(Boolean);\n\n  const onPrintPage = async () => {\n    try {\n      const { el, title } = getContentAndTitle();\n      if (!el) { alert('Content not found.'); return; }\n\n      // NEW: flatten TabGroups on this page before cloning\n      const restoreTabs = await expandTabGroupsForPrint(el);\n\n      let cssHrefs = collectCssLinks(document);\n      const preview = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"/docs/\"]');\n      try { if (preview?.contentDocument) {\n        const docCss = collectCssLinks(preview.contentDocument);\n        if (docCss.length) cssHrefs = docCss;\n      } } catch {}\n      const project = getProjectName();\n\n      const bodyHTML = sanitizeNodeToHTML(el, location.href);\n\n      // Restore live page state\n      if (typeof restoreTabs === 'function') restoreTabs();\n\n      const html = buildPrintDoc({\n        title,\n        bodyHTML,\n        pageCssHrefs: cssHrefs,\n        headerTitle: project || title,\n        headerSubtitle: project ? title : ''\n      });\n      printHtmlInIframe(html);\n    } catch (e) {\n      cwarn('onPrintPage error', e);\n      alert('Error printing page: ' + (e?.message || e));\n    }\n  };\n\n  const onPrintSection = async () => {\n    const cats = getCategories();\n    if (!cats.length) { alert('No printable categories found. Open a Hub with a sidebar or its preview iframe.'); return; }\n    let chosen; try { chosen = await openCategoryPicker(cats); } catch { return; }\n\n    // Merge & de-dupe URLs (current page first)\n    const seen = new Set(), urls = [];\n    for (const c of chosen) for (const href of c.urls) {\n      const finalHref = normalizeDocUrl(href);\n      const u = new URL(finalHref);\n      if (!seen.has(u.pathname)) { seen.add(u.pathname); urls.push(finalHref); }\n    }\n    urls.sort((A,B) => (new URL(A).pathname === location.pathname ? -1 : new URL(B).pathname === location.pathname ? 1 : 0));\n    if (!urls.length) return alert('No pages to print from the selected categories.');\n    if (urls.length > HARD_LIMIT) { urls.length = HARD_LIMIT; alert(`This selection has many pages. Limiting to the first ${HARD_LIMIT}.`); }\n    else if (urls.length > CONFIRM_LIMIT && !confirm(`Compile ${urls.length} pages into one print job?`)) return;\n\n    const overlay = openOverlay(urls.length, `Categories: ${chosen.map(c => c.title).join(', ')}`);\n    const pages = new Array(urls.length);\n    let completed = 0, started = 0, firstPageCss = null;\n\n    const startNext = () => {\n      if (overlay.isCanceled()) return;\n      while (started \u003c urls.length && (started - completed) \u003c CONCURRENCY) {\n        const idx = started++;\n        const url = urls[idx];\n\n        (async () => {\n          // 1) PUBLIC FETCH (no cookies) with isFramePreview\n          let p = await fetchPublicHTML(url);\n          // 2) Fallback to render iframe if needed (also with isFramePreview)\n          if (!p || !p.html || !p.html.trim()) {\n            p = await loadPageRendered(url);\n          }\n          return p;\n        })().then((p) => {\n          if (p && p.html && p.html.trim()) {\n            pages[idx] = p;\n            if (!firstPageCss && p.cssHrefs && p.cssHrefs.length) firstPageCss = p.cssHrefs;\n          } else {\n            pages[idx] = null;\n          }\n        }).catch(() => {\n          pages[idx] = null;\n        }).finally(() => {\n          completed++;\n          overlay.update(completed, `Loaded ${completed} of ${urls.length}`);\n          if (completed === urls.length) finish();\n          else startNext();\n        });\n      }\n    };\n\n    const finish = () => {\n      if (overlay.isCanceled()) { overlay.set('Canceled.'); setTimeout(overlay.close, 300); return; }\n      const good = pages.filter(Boolean);\n      if (!good.length) { overlay.set('No content captured.'); setTimeout(overlay.close, 700); alert('No content could be captured.'); return; }\n\n      const toc = good.map((p) => {\n        let path = ''; try { path = new URL(p.url).pathname; } catch {}\n        return `\u003cli>${escapeHtml(p.title)} \u003cspan style=\"opacity:.6\">— ${escapeHtml(path)}\u003c/span>\u003c/li>`;\n      }).join('');\n\n      const bodies = good.map(p => `\n        \u003csection class=\"print-section\">\n          \u003cdiv class=\"print-body\">${p.html}\u003c/div>\n          \u003cdiv class=\"page-break\">\u003c/div>\n        \u003c/section>`).join('');\n\n      const project = getProjectName();\n      const isSingle = chosen.length === 1;\n      const docTitle = isSingle ? chosen[0].title : (project || 'Print');\n      const headerTitle = project || (isSingle ? chosen[0].title : '');\n      const headerSubtitle = isSingle && project ? chosen[0].title : '';\n      const pageCssHrefs = firstPageCss && firstPageCss.length ? firstPageCss : collectCssLinks(document);\n\n      const html = buildPrintDoc({\n        title: docTitle,\n        bodyHTML: `\u003cdiv class=\"toc\">\u003ch2>Contents\u003c/h2>\u003col>${toc}\u003c/ol>\u003c/div>${bodies}`,\n        pageCssHrefs,\n        headerTitle,\n        headerSubtitle\n      });\n\n      overlay.close();\n      printHtmlInIframe(html);\n    };\n\n    startNext();\n  };\n\n  // ========= UI =========\n  const $onPageLoad = (fn) => {\n    if (window.jQuery && typeof window.jQuery === 'function') {\n      try { jQuery(window).on('pageLoad', fn); } catch {}\n    }\n    if (document.readyState === 'loading') { document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => fn()); }\n    else { fn(); }\n  };\n\n  const ensureButtons = () => {\n    if (!document.getElementById(PAGE_BTN_ID)) {\n      const b = document.createElement('button');\n      b.id = PAGE_BTN_ID; b.type = 'button';\n      b.innerHTML = `\u003cspan aria-hidden=\"true\">🖨️\u003c/span>\u003cspan>Print Page\u003c/span>`;\n      b.onclick = onPrintPage; document.body.appendChild(b);\n    }\n    const pageBtn = document.getElementById(PAGE_BTN_ID);\n    let catBtn = document.getElementById(CAT_BTN_ID);\n    if (!catBtn) {\n      catBtn = document.createElement('button');\n      catBtn.id = CAT_BTN_ID; catBtn.type = 'button';\n      catBtn.innerHTML = `\u003cspan aria-hidden=\"true\">📚\u003c/span>\u003cspan>Print Section(s)\u003c/span>`;\n      catBtn.onclick = onPrintSection; document.body.appendChild(catBtn);\n    }\n    const positionStack = () => {\n      if (!pageBtn || !catBtn) return;\n      const r = pageBtn.getBoundingClientRect();\n      const bottom = Math.max(12 + 28, (window.innerHeight - r.top) + GAP_ABOVE_PAGE);\n      catBtn.style.bottom = `${bottom}px`;\n    };\n    positionStack();\n    window.addEventListener('scroll', positionStack, { passive:true });\n    window.addEventListener('resize', positionStack, { passive:true });\n    const iv = setInterval(positionStack, 800);\n    const mo = new MutationObserver(() => {\n      if (!document.body.contains(pageBtn) || !document.body.contains(catBtn)) { clearInterval(iv); mo.disconnect(); }\n    });\n    mo.observe(document.body, { childList:true, subtree:true });\n  };\n\n  // ========= BOOT =========\n  const boot = () => {\n    ensureStyles();\n    if (getContainer()) ensureButtons();\n    if (!getContainer() && document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"/docs/\"]')) ensureButtons();\n  };\n  $onPageLoad(boot);\n  const obs = new MutationObserver(() => { boot(); });\n  obs.observe(document.body, { childList:true, subtree:true });\n\n  // Debug API (no UI)\n  window.__ReadMePrint = {\n    printPage: onPrintPage,\n    printSection: onPrintSection,\n    debugOn: () => { DEBUG = true; console.info(NS, 'Debug ON'); },\n    debugOff: () => { DEBUG = false; console.info(NS, 'Debug OFF'); }\n  };\n})();\n\u003c/script>\n\n\u003c!-- 1) If we are in an iframe (e.g., ReadMe editor), hide everything + stub APIs -->\n\u003cscript>\n(function () {\n  if (window.top === window.self) return; // not in iframe\n\n  // Hide any OT UI if something sneaks in\n  var css = [\n    '#onetrust-banner-sdk',\n    '#ot-sdk-btn-floating',\n    '#ot-sdk-cookie-policy',\n    '#ot-pc-content',\n    '.onetrust-pc-dark-filter',\n    '.ot-sdk-container',\n    '.otFloatingBtnContainer',\n    '#ot-sdk-btn',\n    '#ot-do-not-sell'\n  ].join(',') + '{display:none!important;visibility:hidden!important;opacity:0!important;pointer-events:none!important;}';\n  var style = document.createElement('style');\n  style.textContent = css;\n  document.head.appendChild(style);\n\n  // Stub APIs so calls don't error\n  window.OptanonWrapper = function () {};\n  window.Optanon = window.Optanon || { ToggleInfoDisplay: function () {} };\n\n  // Optional: set local cookies so other code assumes consent happened\n  try {\n    var y = new Date(); y.setFullYear(y.getFullYear() + 1);\n    document.cookie = 'OptanonAlertBoxClosed='+encodeURIComponent(new Date().toISOString())+'; path=/; expires='+y.toUTCString();\n    document.cookie = 'OptanonConsent=isIABGlobal=false&datestamp='+encodeURIComponent(new Date().toISOString())+'; path=/; expires='+y.toUTCString();\n  } catch(e){}\n})();\n\u003c/script>\n\n\u003c!-- 2) PUBLIC ONLY: define OptanonWrapper BEFORE loading the vendor stub -->\n\u003cscript>\nif (window.top === window.self) {\n  window.OptanonWrapper = function () {\n    // your existing footer/jQuery logic goes here (unchanged)\n    // Wait until jQuery and footer exist (SPA-safe)\n    function whenReady(fn){ if (window.jQuery && $(\".basic-footer-l ul\").length) fn(); else setTimeout(()=>whenReady(fn),250); }\n\n    whenReady(function () {\n      const footerList = $(\".basic-footer-l ul\");\n\n      if (!footerList.find(\"#copyright\").length) {\n        footerList.prepend('\u003cli id=\"copyright\">© Copyright 2025 Axonius. All Rights Reserved.\u003c/li>');\n      }\n      if (!footerList.find(\"#ot-sdk-btn\").length) {\n        footerList.append('\u003cli>\u003ca id=\"ot-sdk-btn\" class=\"ot-sdk-show-settings\">Cookie Settings\u003c/a>\u003c/li>');\n      }\n      if (!footerList.find(\"#ot-do-not-sell\").length) {\n        footerList.append('\u003cli>\u003ca id=\"ot-do-not-sell\" class=\"optanon-toggle-display\">Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information\u003c/a>\u003c/li>');\n      }\n      if (!footerList.find(\"#ca-privacy-text\").length) {\n        footerList.append('\u003cli id=\"ca-privacy-text\" style=\"font-size:.8em;line-height:1.4;\">California residents: \u003ca class=\"optanon-toggle-display\" style=\"text-decoration:underline;cursor:pointer;\">Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information\u003c/a>\u003c/li>');\n      }\n\n      $(document).off(\"click\", \"#ot-sdk-btn\").on(\"click\", \"#ot-sdk-btn\", function () {\n        if (typeof Optanon !== \"undefined\" && Optanon.ToggleInfoDisplay) Optanon.ToggleInfoDisplay();\n      });\n      $(document).off(\"click\", \"#ot-do-not-sell\").on(\"click\", \"#ot-do-not-sell\", function () {\n        if (typeof Optanon !== \"undefined\" && Optanon.ToggleInfoDisplay) Optanon.ToggleInfoDisplay();\n      });\n\n      // Optional: remove unwanted global styles from OneTrust\n      const styleSheet = document.getElementById(\"onetrust-style\");\n      if (styleSheet && styleSheet.sheet) {\n        try {\n          const rules = styleSheet.sheet.cssRules || styleSheet.sheet.rules;\n          for (let i = rules.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n            const r = rules[i];\n            if (r.selectorText === \"button\" && r.style[\"border-radius\"]) {\n              styleSheet.sheet.deleteRule(i);\n            }\n          }\n        } catch (err) {}\n      }\n    });\n  };\n}\n\u003c/script>\n\n\u003c!-- 3) Vendor stub: load ONLY when not in an iframe (order-safe) -->\n\u003cscript>\n  // This runs immediately before the vendor tag; if we're in an iframe,\n  // convert the NEXT script tag (the vendor ==========================================================================\n   Axonius / ReadMe\n   ========================================================================== */\n\n/* =============== BASE =============== */\n\n.App,\nbody {\n  font-family: \"Inter\", sans-serif;\n}\n\n@media (max-width: 769px) {\n.hero {\n    display: grid !important;\n    grid-template-columns: auto !important;\n    align-items: center !important;\n    gap: 28px !important;\n}\n.hero-art .hero-img {\n    display: none !important;\n}\n\n  .Header-leftADQdGVqx1wqU,\n  html {\n    overflow-x: hidden !important;\n  }\n}\n\n.Header3zzata9F_ZPQ {\n  box-shadow: none;\n}\n\ntable img {\n  min-width: 25px !important;\n}\n\n/* Buttons */\n.btn {\n  display: inline-block;\n  background: var(--primary);\n  color: #fff;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  padding: 12px 18px;\n  border-radius: 6px;\n  text-decoration: none;\n  box-shadow: none !important;\n}\n\na.btn {\n  color: #fff;\n  /* default white */\n  text-decoration: none;\n  /* optional, if you don’t want underline */\n}\n\na.btn:hover,\na.btn:active {\n  color: #fff !important;\n  /* force white on hover/focus/active */\n}\n\n/* =============== NAV ICONS (image-based) =============== */\n\n.rm-Header-bottom {\n  padding: 10px;\n}\n\n/* Base: make sure ::before actually renders and is visible */\nheader nav a {\n  position: relative;\n}\n\nheader nav a::before {\n  content: \"\" !important;\n  /* force render even if something overrides */\n  display: inline-block;\n  width: 18px;\n  height: 18px;\n  margin-right: 6px;\n  background-repeat: no-repeat;\n  background-position: center;\n  background-size: contain;\n  vertical-align: middle;\n}\n\n/* DARK MODE default: make black art appear white */\n[data-color-mode=\"dark\"] header nav a::before {\n  filter: invert(1) brightness(115%);\n}\n\n@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {\n  [data-color-mode=\"system\"] header nav a::before {\n    filter: invert(1) brightness(115%);\n  }\n}\n\n/* Header link style (light + dark variants) */\n.ThemeContext_line:not(:has(.Header-links-buttons)) .rm-Header-bottom-link {\n  font-size: 1em;\n  height: 100%;\n  margin-left: 0;\n  padding: 8px 10px;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  position: relative;\n  color: #000;\n}\n\n@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {\n  [data-color-mode=\"system\"] .ThemeContext_line:not(:has(.Header-links-buttons)) .rm-Header-bottom-link {\n    color: #fff;\n  }\n}\n\n[data-color-mode=\"dark\"] .ThemeContext_line:not(:has(.Header-links-buttons)) .rm-Header-bottom-link {\n  color: #fff;\n}\n\n/* Active Docs link → force icon orange (including dark) */\nheader nav a[href$=\"/docs/\"].__active::before,\nheader nav a[href$=\"/docs\"].__active::before {\n  filter: none !important;\n  background-image: none !important;\n  -webkit-mask-image: url(\"https://files.readme.io/33afef83fbb810048e002d6001ebffee84f4eb1ae70b9133ba25a56389637b38-Nav_AxoniusDocumentation.svg\");\n  mask-image: url(\"https://files.readme.io/33afef83fbb810048e002d6001ebffee84f4eb1ae70b9133ba25a56389637b38-Nav_AxoniusDocumentation.svg\");\n  -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;\n  mask-repeat: no-repeat;\n  -webkit-mask-position: center;\n  mask-position: center;\n  -webkit-mask-size: contain;\n  mask-size: contain;\n  background-color: #ff6112 !important;\n  /* brand orange */\n}\n\n/* Axonius Documentation — match /docs or /docs/ (absolute OR relative) */\nheader nav a[href$=\"/docs\"],\nheader nav a[href$=\"/docs/\"],\nheader nav a[href*=\"readme.io/docs\"] {\n  /* no image here; image is set on ::before rule below */\n}\n\nheader nav a[href$=\"/docs\"]::before,\nheader nav a[href$=\"/docs/\"]::before,\nheader nav a[href*=\"readme.io/docs\"]::before {\n  --nav-icon: url(\"https://files.readme.io/33afef83fbb810048e002d6001ebffee84f4eb1ae70b9133ba25a56389637b38-Nav_AxoniusDocumentation.svg\");\n  background-image: var(--nav-icon) !important;\n}\n\n/* Support Center — Zendesk or support subdomain */\nheader nav a[href*=\"zendesk.com\"],\nheader nav a[href*=\"support.axonius\"] {}\n\nheader nav a[href*=\"zendesk.com\"]::before,\nheader nav a[href*=\"support.axonius\"]::before {\n  --nav-icon: url(\"https://files.readme.io/13221d07eb15839ad594065fc4ce5591553a120dc558afc1c0b769a39dc81e97-Nav_Support.svg\");\n  background-image: var(--nav-icon) !important;\n}\n\n/* Axonius.com — main marketing site */\nheader nav a[href*=\"://www.axonius.com\"],\nheader nav a[href^=\"/?to=axonius.com\"] {\n  /* extra guard in case routing helpers are used */\n}\n\nheader nav a[href*=\"://www.axonius.com\"]::before,\nheader nav a[href^=\"/?to=axonius.com\"]::before {\n  --nav-icon: url(\"https://files.readme.io/298622abc2c3e29ee5897fcc8550c1a881e705714fd8290a37ea79048e1d1a0d-Nav_Axoniuscom.svg\");\n  background-image: var(--nav-icon) !important;\n}\n\n/* Release Notes — /changelog (absolute OR relative) */\nheader nav a[href$=\"/changelog\"],\nheader nav a[href$=\"/changelog/\"],\nheader nav a[href*=\"readme.io/changelog\"] {}\n\nheader nav a[href$=\"/changelog\"]::before,\nheader nav a[href$=\"/changelog/\"]::before,\nheader nav a[href*=\"readme.io/changelog\"]::before {\n  --nav-icon: url(\"https://files.readme.io/b8f9edc33a418a8625235d1506a6322e5a970bfdd51aec48afab4d3e72c97d28-Nav_ReleaseNotes.svg\");\n  background-image: var(--nav-icon) !important;\n}\n\n/* Hide specific primary-nav items (absolute paths) */\nheader nav a[href=\"/docs\"],\nheader nav a[href=\"/recipes\"],\nheader nav a[href=\"/reference\"],\nheader nav a[href=\"/changelog\"],\nheader nav a[href=\"/discuss\"] {\n  display: none !important;\n}\n\n@media (max-width: 1230px) {\n  .ThemeContext_line:not(:has(.Header-links-buttons)) .rm-Header-bottom-link {\n    font-size: 11px;\n hidden;\n  }\n}\n\n\n/* Hide empty TOC and make content fill the space */\n#content-container .content-toc:empty {\n  display: none !important;\n}\n\n/* When TOC is empty, let the body span full width */\n#content-container:has(.content-toc:empty) .content-body {\n  width: 100% !important;\n  max-width: 100% !important;     /* or set a cap:  var(--content-max, 1200px) */\n}\n\n/* In case your grid classes set fixed widths, neutralize them when TOC is empty */\n#content-container:has(.content-toc:empty) .content-body.grid-75 {\n  flex: 1 1 100% !important;\n\n}\n/* =============== HEADER LAYOUT TWEAKS =============== */\n@media (min-width: 1230px) {\n  .Header-leftADQdGVqx1wqU {\n    display: flex;\n    padding: 5px 0 5px 20px;\n    justify-content: center;\n .Sidebar-group-toggleUSiExTB-GVvb {\n  color: #010101;\n}\n\n/* Hover underline accent */\n.ThemeContext_line:not(:has(.Header-links-buttons)) .rm-Header-bottom-link.Button:hover {\n  border-bottom: 1px solid #ff6418 !important;\n  border-radius: 0;\n}\n\n/* Docs body link color in explicit dark mode */\n[data-color-mode=\"dark\"] #content article a {\n  color: #ff6112;\n}\n\n@media pre:not(:hover) button.rdmd-code-copy:not(.rdmd-code-copy_copied) {\n    opacity: 1 !important;\n}\n\n\n/* =============== README SIDEBAR / REFERENCE =============== */\n@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {\n/* highlight background in nav link */\n[data-color-mode=system].reference-redesign .Sidebar-link2Dsha-r-GKh2:active, [data-color-mode=system] .reference-redesign .Sidebar-link2Dsha-r-GKh2.active {\n    background: rgba(255, 97, 17, 0.15) !important;\n    color: #FF6111 !important;\n}\n}\n/* highlight background in nav link */\n[data-color-mode=dark].reference-redesign .Sidebar-link2Dsha-r-GKh2:active, [data-color-mode=dark] .reference-redesign .Sidebar-link2Dsha-r-GKh2.active {\n    background: rgba(255, 97, 17, 0.15) !important;\n    color: #FF6111 !important;\n}\n\n.reference-redesign .Sidebar-listWrapper6Q9_yUrG906C+.Sidebar-listWrapper6Q9_yUrG906C {\n  margin-top: 0px;\n}\n\n/* Category Collapse */\n.rm-Sidebar-section ul {\n  max-height: 0;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  transition: max-height 0.25s ease;\n}\n\n/* First occurrence (kept; includes margin-left) */\n.rm-Sidebar-section.expanded ul {\n  max-height: 9999px;\n  /* high enough for any section */\n  margin-left: 2px;\n}\n\n/* Heading affordance */\n.rm-Sidebar-heading {\n  cursor: pointer;\n  position: relative;\n  padding-right: 26px;\n  /* more room for bigger icon */\n}\n\n.rm-Sidebar-heading::after {\n  font-family: \"Font Awesome 6 Pro\";\n  font-weight: 400;\n  /* Regular weight */\n  content: \"\\f054\";\n  /* fa-chevron-right */\n  position: absolute;\n  right: 0;\n  top: 50%;\n  transform: translateY(-50%);\n  transition: transform 0.2s ease;\n}\n\n.rm-Sidebar-section.expanded>.rm-Sidebar-heading::after {\n  transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(90deg);\n}\n\n/* ----------------------------------------------\n   Axonius Header Link Hover Styling\n---------------------------------------------- */\n\n.rm-Header-bottom-link {\n  transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;\n  border-radius: 8px !important;\n  /* match your screenshot’s rounded look */\n  padding: 8px 16px;\n}\n\n/* Default (non-hover) state */\n.rm-Header-bottom-link span,\n.rm-Header-bottom-link svg,\n.rm-Header-bottom-link i {\n\n  transition: color 0.2s ease-in-out;\n}\n\n/* --- override old underline + ensure rounding on hover --- */\n.ThemeContext_line:not(:has(.Header-links-buttons)) .rm-Header-bottom-link.Button:hover {\n  border-bottom: 0 !important;\n  border-radius: 12px !important;\n}\n\n/* Hover (and active/focus for accessibility) */\n.rm-Header-bottom-link:hover,\n.rm-Header-bottom-link:focus {\n  background-color: rgba(255, 85, 0, 0.08);\n  /* soft light orange */\n  color: #ff5500;\n  /* orange for text */\n}\n\n.rm-Header-bottom-link:hover span,\n.rm-Header-bottom-link:hover svg,\n.rm-Header-bottom-link:hover i,\n.rm-Header-bottom-link:focus span,\n.rm-Header-bottom-link:focus svg,\n.rm-Header-bottom-link:focus i {\n  color: #ff5500;\n  /* same orange for icons and text */\n}\n\n/* Make the pseudo-element icon orange on hover/focus/active */\nheader nav a.rm-Header-bottom-link:hover::before,\nheader nav a.rm-Header-bottom-link:focus::before,\nheader nav a.rm-Header-bottom-link.__active::before {\n  background-image: none !important;\n  -webkit-mask-image: var(--nav-icon);\n  mask-image: var(--nav-icon);\n  -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;\n  mask-repeat: no-repeat;\n  -webkit-mask-position: center;\n  mask-position: center;\n  -webkit-mask-size: contain;\n  mask-size: contain;\n  background-color: #ff6112 !important;\n  filter: none !important;\n}\n\n/* Keep the active item highlighted when using __active */\nheader nav a.rm-Header-bottom-link.__active {\n  background-color: rgba(255, 85, 0, 0.12) !important;\n  color: #ff6112 !important;\n}\n\n/* Optional: active/selected state */\n.rm-Header-bottom-link.active {\n  background-color: rgba(255, 85, 0, 0.12);\n  color: #ff5500;\n}\n\n.rm-Header-bottom-link.active span,\n.rm-Header-bottom-link.active svg,\n.rm-Header-bottom-link.active i {\n  color: #ff5500;\n}\n\n.rm-ThemeToggle,\n.rm-Header-top-link,\n.rm-Header-bottom-link {\n  border: none !important;\n}\n\n/* =============== TABS (per Raph) =============== */\n\n.TabGroup-tab,\n.TabGroup-tab_active {\n  margin-right: 0;\n}\n\n.TabGroup-nav .TabGroup-tab {\n  padding: 12px 10px;\n  /* same spacing for both */\n  border-right: 1px solid #67676766;\n  cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.TabGroup-nav .TabGroup-tab_active {\n  padding: 12px 10px;\n  /* same spacing for both */\n  cursor: pointer;\n  border-right: 1px solid #67676766;\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n  /* ensures background + padding align with border */\n}\n\n.TabGroup-nav .TabGroup-tab:last-child,\n.TabGroup-nav .TabGroup-tab_active:last-child {\n  border-right: none;\n}\n\n.TabGroup-nav .TabGroup-tab_active {\n  background-color: #9d9d9d21;\n  /* shaded background */\n  font-weight: bold;\n}\n\n/* =============== LINKS & CALLOUTS =============== */\n\n.callout.callout a {\n  color: revert;\n}\n\n/* Target only code elements inside table cells */\ntable td code {\n  white-space: pre-wrap;\n  /* allow breaking */\n  word-break: break-all;\n  /* break anywhere if needed */\n  overflow-wrap: anywhere;\n  /* modern fallback */\n  display: block;\n  /* stack nicely if long */\n  max-width: 100%;\n  /* don’t spill out of cell */\n}\n\n/* Remove underlines in marked areas */\n.field-description a[href],\n.field-description a:not([href=\"\"]),\n.markdown-body a[href],\n.markdown-body a:not([href=\"\"]) {\n  text-decoration: none;\n}\n\n/* Target only callouts where the first child is NOT a \u003cp> */\nblockquote.callout>div :first-child:not(p) {\n  margin-top: -5px !important;\n}\n\n/* =============== IMAGES / LIGHTBOX =============== */\n\n.markdown-body .lightbox.closed img {\n  display: inline-block !important;\n  max-width: 100%;\n  min-width: 10px;\n}\n\nspan.img.lightbox.closed {\n  display: inline-block;\n}\n\n/* =============== LISTS & NESTED LISTS =============== */\n\n/* Roman Numerals in lists fix */\n.field-description ol ol,\n.field-description ul ol,\n.markdown-body ol ol,\n.markdown-body ul ol {\n  list-style-type: lower-alpha;\n}\n\n/* Base list spacing */\n.markdown-body ol,\n.field-description ol,\n.markdown-body ul,\n.field-description ul {\n  margin: 0 0 1rem 0;\n  padding-left: 1.25rem;\n}\n\n.markdown-body li,\n.field-description li {\n  margin: 0.25rem 0;\n}\n\n.markdown-body li > ol,\n.markdown-body li > ul,\n.field-description li > ol,\n.field-description li > ul {\n  margin-top: 0.35rem;\n}\n\n/* Bullet lists (disc → circle → square) */\n.markdown-body ul,\n.field-description ul {\n  list-style: disc;\n}\n\n.markdown-body ul ul,\n.field-description ul ul {\n  list-style: circle;\n}\n\n.markdown-body ul ul ul,\n.field-description ul ul ul {\n  list-style: square;\n}\n\n/* Numbered lists (decimal → alpha → roman) */\n.markdown-body ol,\n.field-description ol {\n  list-style: decimal;\n}\n\n.markdown-body ol ol,\n.markdown-body ul ol,\n.field-description ol ol,\n.field-description ul ol {\n  list-style: lower-alpha;\n}\n\n.markdown-body ol ol ol,\n.field-description ol ol ol {\n  list-style: lower-roman;\n}\n\n\n/* Extra spacing for markdown list items that contain sub-lists */\n.markdown-body > ul > li:has(> ul),\n.markdown-body > ol > li:has(> ol),\n.field-description > ol > li:has(> ol) {\n  margin-bottom: 1.4em;          /* more space under parent item */\n}\n\n.markdown-body > ul > li:has(> ul):not(:first-child),\n.markdown-body > ol > li:has(> ul):not(:first-child),\n.markdown-body > ul > li:has(> ol):not(:first-child),\n.markdown-body > ol > li:has(> ol):not(:first-child),\n.field-description > ul > li:has(> ul),\n.rm-Markdown .readme-tailwind :where(ol, ul) {\n  margin: 0 0 1rem 0;\n  padding-left: 1.25rem;\n}\n\n/* Item spacing */\n.readme-tailwind li,\n.rm-Markdown .readme-tailwind li {\n  margin: 0.25rem 0;\n}\n\n/* Nested list top margin */\n.readme-tailwind li > ol,\n.readme-tailwind li > ul,\n.rm-Markdown .readme-tailwind li > ol,\n.rm-Markdown .readme-tailwind li > ul {\n  margin-top: ol,\n.rm-Markdown .readme-tailwind ol {\n  list-style: decimal;\n}\n/* depth 2 = lower-alpha (covers ul > ol and ol > ol) */\n.readme-tailwind ol ol,\n.readme-tailwind ul ol,\n.rm-Markdown .readme-tailwind ol ol,\n.rm-Markdown .readme-tailwind ul ol {\n  list-style: lower-alpha;\n}\n/* depth 3 = lower-roman */\n.readme-tailwind ol ol ol,\n.rm-Markdown .readme-tailwind ol ol ol {\n li:has(> ol):not(:first-child) {\n  margin-top: 1.4em;\n}\n\n/* Optional: catch-all for any future “Reusable” wrappers */\n.rm-Markdown [class*=\"Reusable\"] :where(ol)      { list-style: decimal; }\n.rm-Markdown [class*=\"Reusable\"] :where(ul)      { list-style: disc; }\n.rm-Markdown [class*=\"Reusable\"] ul ul           { list-style: circle; }\n.rm-Markdown [class*=\"Reusable\"] ul ul ul 0; }\n.rm-Markdown [class*=\"Reusable\"] li > :where(ol, ul) { margin-top: 0.35rem; }\n\n/* =============== LAYOUT TWEAKS =============== */\n\n/* Site Container */\n.App .rm-Container {\n  margin-left: auto;\n  margin-right: auto;\n  max-width: 1400px;\n  width: 100%;\n}\n\n/* Expand Pages if no TOC */\n.content-toc:empty {\n  display: none;\n}\n\n.content-toc:empty+.content-body {\n  width: 100%;\n  max-width: 100%;\n}\n\n/* Table Overflow */\n.rdmd-html {\n  width: 100%;\n  max-width: 100%;\n  overflow-x: auto;\n  -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;\n}\n\n\n\n/* =============== DARK MODE (LOGO & TABLE TEXT) =============== */\n\n/* Explicit dark */\n[data-color-mode=\"dark\"] .rm-Logo-img {\n  filter: invert(1) brightness(2);\n}\n\n/* Preferred dark (system) */\n@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {\n  [data-color-mode=\"system\"] .rm-Logo-img {\n    filter: invert(1) brightness(2);\n  }\n\n  /* System dark: TOC link color (kept from original) */\n  [data-color-mode=\"system\"] section.content-toc.grid-25 a {\n    color: #fff !important;\n  }\n}\n\n/* Table Darkmode (preserving styles in case needed) */\n@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {\n  [data-color-mode=system] .rm-Markdown td span {\n    color: #fff !important;\n  }\n}\n\n[data-color-mode=\"dark\"] .rm-Markdown td span {\n  color: #fff !important;\n}\n\n/* Explicit dark: TOC link color */\n[data-color-mode=\"dark\"] section.content-toc.grid-25 a {\n  color: #fff !important;\n}","stylesheet_hub3":"","javascript":"","javascript_hub2":"// External Links / Anchor Handling (SPA-safe, TOC-friendly)\n(function () {\n  'use strict';\n\n  const ALLOWED_HOSTS = new Set([\n    'axonius-help-group.readme.io',\n    'docs.axonius.com'\n  ]);\n\n  const SKIP_SCHEMES = /^(mailto:|tel:|javascript:|data:)/i;\n\n  function isAbsoluteHttp(href) {\n    return /^https?:\\/\\//i.test(href);\n  }\n\n  function isHashOnly(href) {\n    return href.startsWith('#');\n  }\n\n  function repairBrokenRootHashes(root = document) {\n    // Fix already-rendered \"/#section\" -> \"#section\" (common TOC break)\n    root.querySelectorAll('a[href^=\"/#\"]').forEach(a => {\n      a.setAttribute('href', a.getAttribute('href').replace(/^\\/#/, '#'));\n    });\n  }\n\n  function processLinks(root = document) {\n    // First, repair any \"/#...\" that may have been injected earlier\n    repairBrokenRootHashes(root);\n\n    root.querySelectorAll('a[href]').forEach(link => {\n      try {\n        const rawHref = (link.getAttribute('href') || '').trim();\n        if (!rawHref || SKIP_SCHEMES.test(rawHref)) return;\n\n        // ✅ Keep in-page anchors intact (TOC, heading links, etc.)\n        if (isHashOnly(rawHref)) return;\n\n        // Use full current URL as base (handles SPA subpaths correctly)\n        const url = new URL(rawHref, window.location.href);\n\n        const isAbsolute = isAbsoluteHttp(rawHref);\n        const isAllowedHost = ALLOWED_HOSTS.has(url.hostname);\n\n        // --- Rule 1: Only rewrite fully-qualified docs.axonius.com links to relative\n        // e.g. https://docs.axonius.com/docs/foo#bar  ->  /docs/foo#bar\n        if (isAbsolute && url.hostname === 'docs.axonius.com') {\n          const relativePath = url.pathname + url.search + url.hash;\n          link.setAttribute('href', relativePath);\n          // Internal links: ensure normal same-tab behavior\n          link.removeAttribute('target');\n          link.removeAttribute('rel');\n          return;\n        }\n\n        // Note: site-absolute paths like \"/docs/...\" are already fine (do nothing)\n\n        // --- Rule 2: External absolute links → open in new tab\n        if (isAbsolute && !isAllowedHost) {\n          link.setAttribute('target', '_blank');\n          link.setAttribute('rel', 'noopener noreferrer');\n        } else {\n          // Internal/relative links → normal behavior\n          link.removeAttribute('target');\n          link.removeAttribute('rel');\n        }\n      } catch {\n        // Ignore invalid URLs\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  // Initial run\n  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => processLinks());\n  } else {\n    processLinks();\n  }\n\n  // Re-run when the SPA mutates the DOM\n  const observer = new MutationObserver(mutations => {\n    let needsProcess = false;\n    for (const m of mutations) {\n      if (m.addedNodes && m.addedNodes.length) {\n        needsProcess = true;\n        break;\n      }\n    }\n    if (needsProcess) processLinks();\n  });\n  observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });\n\n})();\n\n\n\n/* 0) Optional: hush ONLY the #418 console noise (keeps other errors visible) */\n(function suppressReact418() {\n  const origOnError = window.onerror;\n  window.onerror = function (msg, url, line, col, err) {\n    if (String(msg).includes('Minified React error #418')) return true;\n    return origOnError ? origOnError.apply(this, arguments) : false;\n  };\n  window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', (e) => {\n    if (e?.reason && String(e.reason).includes('Minified React error #418')) e.preventDefault();\n  });\n})();\n\n\n\n// Intercept clicks anywhere on the page (works with SPA content too)\n(function () {\n  // Detect if we're inside a sandboxed iframe (e.g., an editor preview)\n  function inSandboxedIframe() {\n    try {\n      if (window.top === window) return false; // Not in an iframe\n      const frame = window.frameElement;\n      return !!(frame && frame.hasAttribute('sandbox')); // Explicit sandbox\n    } catch {\n      // If we can't access top (cross-origin), assume sandboxed\n      return true;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Intercept clicks anywhere on the page (works with SPA content too)\n  document.addEventListener('click', async (e) => {\n    const link = e.target.closest('a[href*=\"raw.githubusercontent.com\"]');\n    if (!link) return;\n\n    // Skip entirely in EDIT mode / sandboxed iframe\n    if (inSandboxedIframe()) {\n      // Do nothing and allow default link behavior\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // PUBLIC MODE: Force file download\n    e.preventDefault();\n    e.stopPropagation();\n\n    try {\n      const url = link.href;\n      const u = new URL(url);\n      const filename = decodeURIComponent(u.pathname.split('/').pop() || 'download');\n\n      // Fetch the file as a blob (GitHub Raw sets CORS: *)\n      const res = await fetch(url, { mode: 'cors', credentials: 'omit' });\n      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);\n      const blob = await res.blob();\n\n      // Create a temporary object URL and force a download\n      const blobUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n      const a = document.createElement('a');\n      a.href = blobUrl;\n      a.download = filename;  // controls the saved filename\n      document.body.appendChild(a);\n      a.click();\n      a.remove();\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl);\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error('[download-fallback]', err);\n      // Fallback: navigate to the URL (will open inline if browser chooses)\n      window.location.href = link.href;\n    }\n  });\n})();\n\n\n\n// Image Helper to push down a line in lists so text wraps (only for big images)\n(() => {\n  const THRESHOLD_PX = 200; // apply only to images >= this size\n\n  function previousNonWhitespaceSibling(node) {\n    let n = node.previousSibling;\n    while (n && n.nodeType === 3 && !n.textContent.trim()) n = n.previousSibling;\n    return n;\n  }\n\n  function getClosestImg(el) {\n    return el.tagName === 'IMG' ? el : el.querySelector('img');\n  }\n\n  function getRenderedSize(el) {\n    // Prefer actual rendered box\n    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();\n    let w = rect.width || 0;\n    let h = rect.height || 0;\n\n    // If it's an \u003cimg> and not rendered yet, fall back to natural size if available\n    if ((w === 0 || h === 0) && el.tagName === 'IMG') {\n      if (el.naturalWidth && el.naturalHeight) {\n        w = Math.max(w, el.naturalWidth);\n        h = Math.max(h, el.naturalHeight);\n      }\n    }\n    return { w, h };\n  }\n\n  function meetsThreshold(wrapper) {\n    // Measure wrapper; if it's a lightbox container with zero size, peek at the inner \u003cimg>\n    let { w, h } = getRenderedSize(wrapper);\n    if (w === 0 && h === 0) {\n      const innerImg = getClosestImg(wrapper);\n      if (innerImg) ({ w, h } = getRenderedSize(innerImg));\n    }\n    return (w >= THRESHOLD_PX) || (h >= THRESHOLD_PX);\n  }\n\n  function ensureAfterLoad(img, cb) {\n    // If we can't size it yet, wait for load/decode and try again once.\n    const canMeasure = () => {\n      const r = img.getBoundingClientRect();\n      return (r.width > 0 || r.height > 0 || (img.naturalWidth && img.naturalHeight));\n    };\n    if (canMeasure()) return cb();\n\n    const once = () => { img.removeEventListener('load', once); cb(); };\n    img.addEventListener('load', once, { once: true });\n\n    // Attempt decode when supported (doesn't throw if not)\n    if (img.decode) {\n      img.decode().then(cb).catch(() => {/* ignore */});\n    }\n  }\n\n  function insertBreakBeforeListImages(root = document) {\n    const imgs = root.querySelectorAll('ol li img, ul li img');\n\n    imgs.forEach((img) => {\n      const li = img.closest('li');\n      if (!li) return;\n\n      const wrapper = img.closest('.img.lightbox') || img;\n      const p = wrapper.closest('p');\n      if (!p || !p.contains(wrapper)) return;\n\n      const process = () => {\n        if (!meetsThreshold(wrapper)) return;\n\n        // Is there meaningful content before this image within the same \u003cp>?\n        let hasContentBefore = false;\n        for (let n = wrapper.previousSibling; n; n = n.previousSibling) {\n          if (n.nodeType === 3 && n.textContent.trim().length) { hasContentBefore = true; break; }\n          if (n.nodeType === 1 && n.tagName !== 'BR') { hasContentBefore = true; break; }\n        }\n        if (!hasContentBefore) return;\n\n        // Avoid duplicates (any \u003cbr> or our own marker directly before)\n        const prev = previousNonWhitespaceSibling(wrapper);\n        const alreadyHasBreak =\n          prev && prev.nodeType === 1 &&\n          prev.tagName === 'BR' &&\n          (prev.dataset.insertedBy === 'listImageSpacer' || true);\n\n        if (!alreadyHasBreak) {\n          const br = document.createElement('br');\n          br.dataset.insertedBy = 'listImageSpacer';\n          p.insertBefore(br, wrapper);\n        }\n      };\n\n      // If we can’t size yet, wait until image loads/decodes\n      ensureAfterLoad(img, process);\n      // Also try immediately (covers already-loaded or CSS-sized cases)\n      process();\n    });\n  }\n\n  // Run once on load\n  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => insertBreakBeforeListImages());\n  } else {\n    insertBreakBeforeListImages();\n  }\n\n  // Watch for SPA updates / async content\n  const mo = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {\n    for (const m of mutations) {\n      if (m.type === 'childList' && m.addedNodes.length) {\n        m.addedNodes.forEach((node) => {\n          if (node.nodeType === 1) insertBreakBeforeListImages(node);\n        });\n      }\n    }\n  });\n  mo.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });\n})();\n\n\n\n// Links helper in lists so if there is a comma separating them we add a space (if there was no space initially)\n\n(() => {\n  const EXCLUDE_SEL = 'code, pre, kbd, samp, .rdmd-code, .cm-s-neo, [data-no-spacefix]';\n\n  function isInExcluded(node) {\n    return node.parentElement && node.parentElement.closest(EXCLUDE_SEL);\n  }\n\n  function inListItem(node) {\n    const el = node.parentElement;\n    return !!(el && el.closest('li') && el.closest('ul, ol'));\n  }\n\n  function insertSpaceBetweenNodes(beforeNode) {\n    // Find the nearest ancestor that actually has a following sibling\n    let anchor = beforeNode;\n    while (anchor && !anchor.nextSibling) {\n      if (!anchor.parentNode) return;\n      anchor = anchor.parentNode;\n      // Stop if we leave the list item context\n      if (!(anchor.closest ? inListItem({ parentElement: anchor }) : true)) return;\n    }\n    if (!anchor || !anchor.nextSibling) return;\n\n    const next = anchor.nextSibling;\n\n    // If next is text and already starts with space, done\n    if (next.nodeType === 3) {\n      if (!next.textContent.startsWith(' ')) {\n        next.textContent = ' ' + next.textContent;\n      }\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // If next is element, insert a single space text node before it\n    const space = document.createTextNode(' ');\n    anchor.parentNode.insertBefore(space, next);\n  }\n\n  function fixCommasInLists(root = document) {\n    // TreeWalker over text nodes for precision\n    const walker = document.createTreeWalker(\n      root,\n      NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,\n      {\n        acceptNode(n) {\n          if (!n.parentElement) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;\n          if (!inListItem(n)) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;\n          if (isInExcluded(n)) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;\n          // Ignore pure whitespace nodes\n          if (!n.textContent || !n.textContent.includes(',')) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;\n          return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;\n        }\n      }\n    );\n\n    const toProcess = [];\n    while (walker.nextNode()) toProcess.push(walker.currentNode);\n\n    toProcess.forEach((tn) => {\n      // 1) Inside-node fixes: \",X\" -> \", X\"\n      const replaced = tn.textContent.replace(/,([^\\s,])/g, ', $1');\n      if (replaced !== tn.textContent) tn.textContent = replaced;\n\n      // 2) Boundary fix: if the text node ends with a comma, ensure a space\n      //    exists between this node (or its ancestor element) and the next sibling.\n      //    This also covers commas that live inside inline elements like \u003ca>.\n      const endsWithComma = /,\\s*$/.test(tn.textContent) || /,$/.test(tn.textContent);\n      if (endsWithComma) {\n        // If immediate nextSibling is a text node starting with space, we're good.\n        let next = tn.nextSibling;\n        // Skip over empty text nodes\n        while (next && next.nodeType === 3 && next.textContent === '') next = next.nextSibling;\n\n        if (next) {\n          if (next.nodeType === 3) {\n            if (!next.textContent.startsWith(' ')) {\n              next.textContent = ' ' + next.textContent;\n            }\n          } else {\n            // Element next: insert a space between nodes\n            const space = document.createTextNode(' ');\n            tn.parentNode.insertBefore(space, next);\n          }\n        } else {\n          // No sibling in this container — climb to the nearest ancestor that has one\n          insertSpaceBetweenNodes(tn);\n        }\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  // Run now/when ready\n  const run = () => fixCommasInLists(document);\n  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', run);\n  } else {\n    run();\n  }\n\n  // Watch for SPA/async content\n  const mo = new MutationObserver((muts) => {\n    for }\n  });\n  mo.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });\n})();\n\n/* ============================================\n   Custom Data Tables (on-demand enable) — silent + hardened\n   - jQuery/DataTables load order & single instance\n   - Safe against double-inits & SPA mutations\n   ============================================ */\n(() => {\n  const INIT_DELAY = 800;\n  const MIN_ROWS   = 5;\n\n  /* ---------- NEW: OVERRIDE CONTROLS ---------- */\n  // 1) Page allowlist (pathname regexes). Matches ReadMe docs routes.\nconst PAGE_ALLOWLIST = [\n  /\\/docs\\/salesforce$/i,\n  /\\/docs\\/box$/i,\n  /\\/docs\\/lucidchart$/i,\n  /\\/docs\\/workday$/i,\n  /\\/docs\\/jamf-pro$/i,\n Selectors that indicate a forced DT init if present on a table or ancestor.\n  const FORCE_SELECTORS = ['.dt-force', '[data-dt-force=\"true\"]'];\n\n  // 3) Query param: ?dt=force (works for SPA too)\n  const hasForceQuery = () => {\n    try {\n      const usp = new URLSearchParams(location.search);\n      return (usp.get('dt') || '').toLowerCase() === 'force';\n    } catch { return false; }\n  };\n\n  // Utility: does current page match allowlist?\n  const pageIsForced = () => {\n    const p = (location.pathname || '').toLowerCase().replace(/\\/+$/,'');\n    return PAGE_ALLOWLIST.some(rx => rx.test(p));\n  };\n\n  // Decide if a given table should be forced\n  const shouldForce = (table) => {\n    if (pageIsForced()) return true;\n    if (hasForceQuery()) return true;\n    if (!table) return false;\n\n    // Table tagged directly?\n    if (table.matches && FORCE_SELECTORS.some(sel => table.matches(sel))) return true;\n\n    // Any ancestor tagged?\n    let node = table.parentElement;\n    while (node && node !== document.body) {\n      for (const sel of FORCE_SELECTORS) {\n        if (node.matches && node.matches(sel)) return true;\n      }\n      node = node.parentElement;\n    }\n    // Body-level flag\n    if (document.body && FORCE_SELECTORS.some(sel => document.body.matches(sel))) return true;\n    return false;\n  };\n  /* ---------- END OVERRIDE CONTROLS ---------- */\n\n  const CSS = `\n    .rdmd-table-inner { position: relative; }\n    .dt-flex-container { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; width:100%; }\n    .dt-buttons { display:flex; gap:5px; }\n    div.dt-buttons>.dt-button:focus:not(.disabled),\n    div.dt-buttons>div.dt-button-split .dt-button:focus:not(.disabled){ outline:none; }\n (document.querySelector(`script[src=\"${src}\"]`)) return res();\n    const s = document.createElement('script');\n    s.src = src; s.async = true; s.onload = res; s.onerror = () => rej(new 'https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/pdfmake/0.2.8/vfs_fonts.js'\n    ];\n    await Promise.all(extScripts.map(loadScript));\n Normalize structure so DT won’t die on empty \u003cthead>\n  function normalizeTableStructure(table) {\n    // Ensure \u003ctbody>\n    if (!table.tBodies || table.tBodies.length === 0) {\n      const tbody = document.createElement('tbody');\n      // Move any stray rows/sections into tbody (except a thead if present)\n      while (table.firstElementChild) {\n        const el = table.firstElementChild;\n        if (el.tagName && el.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'thead') break;\n        tbody.appendChild(el);\n      }\n      table.appendChild(tbody);\n    }\n    const tbody = table.tBodies[0];\n\n    // Ensure usable \u003cthead>\u003cth>…\u003c/th>\n    let thead = table.tHead;\n    const hasTh = thead && thead.querySelectorAll('th').length > 0;\n    if (!hasTh) {\n      if (!thead) {\n        thead = document.createElement('thead');\n        table.insertBefore(thead, tbody);\n      }\n      thead.innerHTML = '';\n\n      const firstRow = tbody.querySelector('tr');\n      const cellCount = firstRow ? firstRow.children.length : 0;\n\n      // Heuristic: promote first row if it looks like headers\n      let promote = false;\n      if (firstRow && cellCount) {\n        const cells = Array.from(firstRow.children);\n        const strongCount = cells.filter(td => td.querySelector('strong')).length;\n        const avgLen = cells.reduce((n, td) => n + td.textContent.trim().length, 0) / cellCount;\n        promote = strongCount >= Math.ceil(cellCount / 2) || avgLen \u003c= 28;\n      }\n\n      const trHead = document.createElement('tr');\n      if (promote && firstRow) {\n        Array.from(firstRow.children).forEach(td => {\n          const th = document.createElement('th');\n          th.textContent = (td.textContent || '').replace(/\\s+/g, ' ').trim() || '—';\n          trHead.appendChild(th);\n        });\n        thead.appendChild(trHead);\n        firstRow.remove();\n        table.setAttribute('data-dt-header-promoted', 'true');\n      } else {\n        const cols =\n          cellCount ||\n          Math.max(0, ...Array.from(tbody.querySelectorAll('tr')).map(r => r.children.length));\n        for (let i = 0; i \u003c cols; i++) {\n          const th = document.createElement('th');\n          th.textContent = `Column ${i + 1}`;\n          trHead.appendChild(th);\n        }\n        thead.appendChild(trHead);\n        table.setAttribute('data-dt-header-synth', 'true');\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  // row counter: prefer \u003ctbody>, else all minus thead\n  const rowCount = (table) => {\n    const body = table.querySelectorAll('tbody tr').length;\n    if (body) return body;\n    const all  = table.rows ? table.rows.length : 0;\n    const head = table.tHead && table.tHead.rows ? table.tHead.rows.length : 0;\n    return Math.max(0, all - head);\n  };\n\n  const initOne = (table) => {\n    // Fix structure (handles empty \u003cthead>)\n    normalizeTableStructure(table);\n\n    if (table.hasAttribute('data-dt-processed')) return;\n\n    const count = rowCount(table);\n    const wrapper = table.closest('.rdmd-table-inner') || table.closest('.rdmd-table') || table.parentElement;\n    if (!wrapper) return;\n\n    /* ---------- MODIFIED: Respect MIN_ROWS unless forced ---------- */\n    if (count \u003c MIN_ROWS && !shouldForce(table)) {\n      table.setAttribute('data-dt-skip','small');\n      // If a trigger happened to exist for this table id, hide it\n      if (table.id) {\n        const stray = wrapper.querySelector(`button[aria-controls=\"${table.id}\"]`);\n        if (stray) stray.remove();\n      }\n      return;\n    } else {\n      table.removeAttribute('data-dt-skip');\n    }\n    /* ---------- END MOD ---------- */\n\n    table.setAttribute('data-dt-processed','true');\n    table.setAttribute('data-original-html', table.innerHTML);\n    if (!table.id) table.id = 'data-table-' + Math.floor(Math.random() * 1e6);\n\n    // add trigger if absent\n    let trigger = wrapper.querySelector(`button[aria-controls=\"${table.id}\"]`);\n    if (!trigger) {\n      trigger = document.createElement('button');\n      trigger.type = 'button';\n      trigger.title = 'Enable filter/export';\n      trigger.setAttribute('aria-controls', table.id);\n      trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');\n      trigger.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;z-index:3;cursor:pointer;border:0;' +\n                              'border-radius:0 0 0 3px;color:#fff;background:linear-gradient(#56b8ff,#018ef5c9);';\n      trigger.innerHTML = '\u003ci class=\"fa fa-ellipsis-v\" aria-hidden=\"true\" style=\"font-size:12px;padding:4px 6px;\">\u003c/i>';\n      wrapper.insertBefore(trigger, wrapper.firstChild);\n    }\n\n    trigger.onclick = () => {\n      if (table.getAttribute('data-filter-enabled')) { \"\u003c'dt-flex-container'\u003c'dt-search'f>\u003c'dt-buttons'B>>\",\n        language: { search: \"\", searchPlaceholder: \"Search Table:\" },\n        buttons: [\n          { extend: 'colvis', fa-file-csv\">\u003c/i>' },\n          { extend: 'excel', text: '\u003ci class=\"fa fa-file-excel\">\u003c/i>' },\n          { extend: 'pdf',   text: '\u003ci class=\"fa fa-file-pdf\">\u003c/i>' },\n          { extend: 'print', text: '\u003ci class=\"fa fa-print\">\u003c/i>', action: () => setTimeout(()=>window.print(),100) },\n          { text: '\u003ci class=\"fa fa-ban\">\u003c/i>',\n            action: function () {\n              this.destroy();\n              table.innerHTML = table.getAttribute('data-original-html') || table.innerHTML;\n trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true');\n    };\n  };\n\n  const initAll = () => {\n    document.querySelectorAll('.rdmd-table table, table').forEach(initOne);\n  };\n\n  const start = async ()
